name: Lindsey Miller, Martin Heinrich for Senate
subject: This is bad, bad, bad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This is bad, bad, bad. Republicans have already talked to _20 million voters_ -- we need to pick up the pace.

**_[Help us fight back and build the Democratic groundswell we need to take back the Senate, friend. We still need $10,205 to stay on track with our organizing efforts->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+fight+back+and+build+the+Democra&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2")_**

_**Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:**_

The team and I are nervous about this headline.

_" RNC fights blue wave by already contacting 20 million voters" \- NBC News_

This is the _last thing_ we needed to hear after the Koch brothers have already started running digital ads against me.

**_[We must power a massive groundswell of Democratic action to fight back. Help me raise another $15,000 in the next 48 hours so we can keep our blue wave surging forward->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+We+must+power+a+massive+groundswell+of+D&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2")_**

National Republicans have already spoken to over 20 million voters on the phone or at their homes. **If you include digital actions and direct mail contacts, they 've made nearly 500 million voter contacts.**
**[STOP THE GOP>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+STOP+THE+GOP+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2")** As Democrats, we pride ourselves on our grassroots organizing. But now Republicans and the Koch brothers are getting in the game, and it's clear they are willing to spend whatever it takes to defend their Senate and House majorities.

**_[That is why I need your help immediately. We need to raise another $15,000 in the next 48 hours to stay on track for our mid-month budget goals. We can't afford to miss these projections and fall behind to the Republican outreach machine.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+That+is+why+I+need+your+help+immediately&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_2_2")** Thanks for your support,
Martin

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Smith=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Voting Starts in 2 Weeks!! You Can Make a Difference!!!
body:
Stop the "Blue Wave" at the Arizona border. Flip the First and Send Mr. Smith to Washington! -- | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/stevesmithaz.com/july17volunteer-2666431?e=1fa29a1af8)
---
| | [ ](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=cd46e4a5a0&e=1fa29a1af8)
---
| | **Send the real Mr. Smith to Washington!**
**Dear ****Fellow Patriot****,**
_**What would you do to keep Nancy Pelosi out of the Speaker's chair?**_

**Voting Starts in 2 Weeks, and We Urgently Need Your Help to Reach Republican Voters in CD1.**
**_NOW is the time to get involved!_ ****You are invited to participate in one of the events below, or help out in your own backyard.**

**Here are a few of the upcoming opportunities to participate.**
**_Meet and Greets:_** **Thursday, July 19****th****, Show Low** **Show Low Meet and Greet**
5:30 PM - 7:30 PM
Holiday Inn Express Conference Room
151 W. Deuce of Clubs, Show Low, AZ
RSVP to Dustin Graham at: 928-386-3440 or [duhastfire@hotmail.com](mailto:duhastfire@hotmail.com) **Friday, July 20****th****, Casa Grande** **Casa Grande Meet and Greet**
6:00 PM - 8:00 PM
The Central Event Hall
408 N. Sacaton St, Suite II, Casa Grande, AZ
RSVP to Irving Scott at: 520 208 3015 or [iescott@cox.net](mailto:iescott@cox.net) **Saturday, July 21****st****, Pinetop** **Pinetop-Lakeside Meet and Greet**
12:00 PM - 2:00 PM
The Home of Kathryn and Gary Burger
2933 Aspen Loop, Pinetop, AZ
RSVP to Gary Burger at: 602-291-4805 or [garyburger53@gmail.com](mailto:garyburger53@gmail.com)

**Thursday, August**** ****2 nd****, Maricopa** **Maricopa Meet and Greet**
6:00 PM - 7:30 PM
RSVP to [https://SteveSmith0802.EventBrite.com](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=8e0ce49f4e&e=1fa29a1af8)

**_Parades:_
Saturday, July 21****st****, Snowflake** **Snowflake Annual Pioneer Days Parade**
9:00 AM
Come march with us or cheer us on!
Parade starts at 9th St. South and 2nd St. West in Snowflake, AZ
RSVP to Linda Murtha at: 516-784-9417 or [linda@stevesmithaz.com](mailto:linda@stevesmithaz.com)

**Saturday, July 21****st****, St. Johns** **St. Johns Pioneer Days Parade**
10:00 AM
Want to march?
Parade starts at Coronado Elementary, 50 N. Water Street, St. Johns, AZ
RSVP to Linda Murtha at: 516-784-9417 or [linda@stevesmithaz.com](mailto:linda@stevesmithaz.com)

**_Walk, Drive, or Call:_
Saturday, July 21****st****, Camp Verde** **Camp Verde Canvas Event**
9:00 AM
Come join us to Get Out The Vote in Camp Verde!
400 Finnie Flat Rd, Suite 1C, Camp Verde, AZ
RSVP to Rob Witt at: 928-202-1000 or [robertmwitts@gmail.com](mailto:robertmwitts@gmail.com) **Saturday, July 21****st****, Sedona** **Sedona Phone Banking Event**
9:00 AM – 3:00 PM
Please join us in making calls together in Sedona!
Lunch will be provided
The Home of Andrea and Dwight Kadar
195 Sin Salida
Sedona, Arizona 86351
RSVP to Dwight Kadar at 281-610-0725 **Saturday, July 21****st****, Casa Grande** **Casa Grande Canvas Event**
4:00 PM
Come join us to Get Out The Vote in Casa Grande
Steve Smith Campaign Office
408 N. Sacaton St, Suite H, Casa Grande
RSVP to Irving Scott at: 520 208 3015 or [iescott@cox.net](mailto:iescott@cox.net) **Saturday, July 21****st****and Sunday, July 22****nd****, Maricopa** **Maricopa Canvas Event**
9:00 AM
Come join us to Get Out The Vote in Maricopa
Quick Trip
20530 John Wayne Pkwy, Maricopa
RSVP to Linda Murtha at: 516-784-9417 or [linda@stevesmithaz.com](mailto:linda@stevesmithaz.com)
**If you can’t make any of these events, you can still help send Mr. Smith to Washington!** **_Here's How You Can Help!_ ** **Call from Home!** We need help calling the Republican primary voters in the district and telling them about Steve Smith and the campaign. We have an easy to use **“phone from home”** system that will provide you with phone numbers and information on exactly what to say. It provides the recipient with our phone number, not yours, so you won't have people calling you back on your number. **We are calling every day. If you can give us just an hour from your home, it is a tremendous way that you can help Steve win!** Just call Linda at 516-784-9417 or email [linda@stevesmithaz.com](mailto:linda@stevesmithaz.com) and get set up right away.

_**Help us send Mr. Smith to Washington!**_

You can learn more about Steve and his record by visiting [_SteveSmithAZ.com_](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=3eb8729cbe&e=1fa29a1af8).

**Thank you for your support, and God Bless.**

Linda Lee Murtha
Deputy Campaign Manager
Steve Smith for Congress

**Our mailing address is:**
Steve Smith for CongressPO Box 1164Maricopa, AZ 85139-0350
[Add us to your address book](//SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/vcard?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=8f65adf258)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/profile?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=8f65adf258&e=1fa29a1af8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=8f65adf258&e=1fa29a1af8&c=4c280f77aa).

name: Senator Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm personally asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, it's Sherrod. I know you're probably getting ready to relax after a long day at work, but I need to check in. [**I 'm personally asking for your contribution.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9fc/4462dc26/54309e3b/20078e47/2158885581/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180717pm?refcode=sbe180717pm_m") We fell short of our first financial goal of the quarter. We can make up lost ground, but only if we raise $3,000 by midnight. Your support is critical to our campaign gaining the resources we need to win. A recent poll shows that my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, is closing the gap. Donate here to help us fight back: [**www.SherrodBrown.com/JulyGoal**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9fc/4462dc26/54309e3b/20078e47/2158885581/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180717pm?refcode=sbe180717pm_m") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: McDaniel for Senate
subject: BREAKING: Clinton donor bankrolling Hyde-Smith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
Who funds Democrat candidates? Democrat donors of course. Cindy Hyde-Smith -- a lifelong Democrat who voted for Hillary Clinton -- is now being funded by one of Hillary Clinton’s biggest supporters! California billionaire, Sean Parker, is bankrolling Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC. Peter, Who funds Democrat candidates? Democrat donors of course. Cindy Hyde-Smith -- a lifelong Democrat who voted for Hillary Clinton -- is now being funded by one of Hillary Clinton’s biggest supporters! California billionaire, Sean Parker, is bankrolling Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC. Parker has a long history of supporting Democrats and extreme liberal causes. • He personally donated almost $300,000 to Hillary Clinton’s campaign • Hosted a fundraiser at his home that raised over $1million for Clinton’s campaign against Donald Trump • Funded campaigns aimed at taking away 2nd Amendment rights in both California and Nevada • ...and made a seven-figure donation to pro-amnesty group FWD.us No one from Mississippi should be accepting money from a California liberal! Help fight back against the California Democrats funding Cindy Hyde-Smith! Chip in today and support sending a true conservative to the Senate! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180716_PAC&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180716_PAC] Chip in $10 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180716_PAC&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180716_PAC] Chip in $25 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180716_PAC&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180716_PAC] Chip in $10 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180716_PAC&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180716_PAC] Chip in $100 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180716_PAC&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180716_PAC] None of the dirty Democrat funding should come as a surprise. After all, Cindy Hyde-Smith voted for Hillary Clinton in the 2008 Democratic primaries, and had been a Democrat for most of her life. Cindy Hyde-Smith doesn’t share the values that Mississippi conservatives stand for and that’s made clear through the donations she’s soliciting from the same California Democrats that funded Hillary Clinton and oppose President Trump’s America First policies. Mississippi deserves better. So chip in today and help support someone who stands with President Trump, not with liberal Democrats. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180716_PAC&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180716_PAC] Remember Mississippi, Chris McDaniel P.S - Cindy Hyde-Smith’s is being bankrolled by one of Hillary Clinton’s major donors. She fights for the same causes as Hillary Clinton. Cindy Hyde-Smith is no friend to President Trump. Quite frankly, she’s the opposite of everything he stands for. Mississippi deserves a Senator who is beholden to the people, not California Democrats. Chip in to help send a true conservative to US Senate! DONATE [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180716_PAC&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180716_PAC] [https://twitter.com/CMForUSSenate]

PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel

Click here to unsubscribe. https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-u-biikyg-ydllhlurty-a/

California billionaire, Sean Parker, is bankrolling Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC. Parker has a long history of supporting Democrats and extreme liberal causes. • He personally donated almost $300,000 to Hillary Clinton’s campaign • Hosted a fundraiser at his home that raised over $1million for Clinton’s campaign against Donald Trump • Funded campaigns aimed at taking away 2nd Amendment rights in both California and Nevada • ...and made a seven-figure donation to pro-amnesty group FWD.us No one from Mississippi should be accepting money from a California liberal! Help fight back against the California Democrats funding Cindy Hyde-Smith! Chip in today and support sending a true conservative to the Senate! [] Chip in $10 [] Chip in $25 [] Chip in $10 [] Chip in $100 [] None of the dirty Democrat funding should come as a surprise. After all, Cindy Hyde-Smith voted for Hillary Clinton in the 2008 Democratic primaries, and had been a Democrat for most of her life. Cindy Hyde-Smith doesn’t share the values that Mississippi conservatives stand for and that’s made clear through the donations she’s soliciting from the same California Democrats that funded Hillary Clinton and oppose President Trump’s America First policies. Mississippi deserves better. So chip in today and help support someone who stands with President Trump, not with liberal Democrats. [] Remember Mississippi, Chris McDaniel P.S - Cindy Hyde-Smith’s is being bankrolled by one of Hillary Clinton’s major donors. She fights for the same causes as Hillary Clinton. Cindy Hyde-Smith is no friend to President Trump. Quite frankly, she’s the opposite of everything he stands for. Mississippi deserves a Senator who is beholden to the people, not California Democrats. Chip in to help send a true conservative to US Senate! DONATE [] [] PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel

name: Tim Kaine
subject: re: Russia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I wanted to write you a note about President Trump's actions yesterday during his meeting and press conference with Vladimir Putin:

**What we saw yesterday from President Trump isn't just disgraceful; it makes Americans less safe.**

By siding with a hostile foreign power over American law enforcement, Trump is jeopardizing our future national security and emboldening our enemies.

The president's comments yesterday were so alarming because he's dismissing all of the facts and very real concerns - while future elections remain at risk.

**We must protect Americans from attacks by foreign adversaries, and we must safeguard our elections from foreign interference.**

Elections will always have consequences. We cannot be bystanders and we cannot expect this ship to right itself. We have to show up, we have to care, and we have to vote in November so we can finally be in a position to hold those who have sought to interfere in our democracy accountable. **Holding our Senate seats, and taking a majority, is the check on this administration _we desperately need._**

[We have a chance to make a statement at the ballot box on November 6, 2018.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f121e/3e0906/69d7e8cf/3e35e3b9/1344568507/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-russia?refcode=20180717_2_FR_TK_Russia&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+We+have+a+chance+to+make+a+statement+at+&utm_campaign=20180717_2_FR_TK_Russia&source=20180717_2_FR_TK_Russia")

The stakes have never been higher, Derek.

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f121e/3e0906/69d7e8cf/3e35e3b8/1344568507/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-russia?refcode=20180717_2_FR_TK_Russia&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180717_2_FR_TK_Russia&source=20180717_2_FR_TK_Russia")

| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 17, 2018 [CORRECTION] Representative Anderson’s Statement Regarding the Trump/Putin Summit in Helsinki Yesterday the world watched in shock and dismay as President Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin held a joint press conference. The two leaders first sat down for a bilateral meeting and then delivered their public remarks live to the press. Standing next to Putin, Trump declined to side with US intelligence on Russian election interference, saying he doesn't "see any reason why" they would be responsible. He may not see it, but a majority of Congress and government officials on both sides of the aisle agree that there is sufficient evidence to conclude that Russia was involved in efforts to meddle in our election, including President Trump’s own appointments, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and Lt. General H.R. McMasters. The statements made by our President make us look foolish and weak. Our electoral system has been exposed as damaged. Instead of speaking out against those who undermine our democracy, he tries to deny it even happened. It begs the question, is President Trump working to undermine our system of democracy? Does your current Representative value our democracy and the alliances we have worked decades to build, or does he turn a blind eye as our country loses standing and credibility around the world? I value our democracy. Does it mean he’s with Trump and not with all of us here in Mississippi? Is he FOR the protection of our democratic process or he AGAINST it? I am for the protection of our democracy. clean_body: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 17, 2018 [CORRECTION] Representative Anderson's Statement Regarding the Trump/Putin Summit in Helsinki Yest | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 17, 2018 [CORRECTION] Representative Anderson’s Statement Regarding the Trump/Putin Summit in Helsinki Yesterday the world watched in shock and dismay as President Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin held a joint press conference. The two leaders first sat down for a bilateral meeting and then delivered their public remarks live to the press. Standing next to Putin, Trump declined to side with US intelligence on Russian election interference, saying he doesn't "see any reason why" they would be responsible. He may not see it, but a majority of Congress and government officials on both sides of the aisle agree that there is sufficient evidence to conclude that Russia was involved in efforts to meddle in our election, including President Trump’s own appointments, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and Lt. General H.R. McMasters. The statements made by our President make us look foolish and weak. Our electoral system has been exposed as damaged. Instead of speaking out against those who undermine our democracy, he tries to deny it even happened. It begs the question, is President Trump working to undermine our system of democracy? Does your current Representative value our democracy and the alliances we have worked decades to build, or does he turn a blind eye as our country loses standing and credibility around the world? I value our democracy. Some are still standing behind the President and not speaking out on this attack. My opponent touts support for the President in his campaign without regard for the people of this district. Does he value President Trump’s opinion over that of the rest of America? Does it mean he’s with Trump and not with all of us here in Mississippi? Is he FOR the protection of our democratic process or he AGAINST it? I am for the protection of our democracy. I am for protecting the value of each and every voter, regardless of how they vote. I am for and stand with the people of South Mississippi. Onward to November!Jeramey Anderson for Congress | |

General H.R. McMasters. The statements made by our President make us look foolish and weak. Our electoral system has been exposed as damaged. Instead of speaking out against those who undermine our democracy, he tries to deny it even happened. It begs the question, is President Trump working to undermine our system of democracy? Does your current Representative value our democracy and the alliances we have worked decades to build, or does he turn a blind eye as our country loses standing and credibility around the world? I value our democracy. Some are still standing behind the President and not speaking out on this attack. My opponent touts support for the President in his campaign without regard for the people of this district. Does he value President Trump’s opinion over that of the rest of America? Does it mean he’s with Trump and not with all of us here in Mississippi? Is he FOR the protection of our democratic process or he AGAINST it? I am for the protection of our democracy. I am for protecting the value of each and every voter, regardless of how they vote. I am for and stand with the people of South Mississippi. Onward to November!Jeramey Anderson for Congress | |

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Public office should mean public trust
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VDoGdzJgGfLZWQoR8PHgU8vZc3jKRNntUSkZYjw6mUU=/4mePkc-ohsu8la44OCDGVxJEsfa7JP81NvK0AOWWzlk=) Friends and Neighbors -- Our state government is funded by your tax payer dollars. That means you should be able to trust the people elected to invest them, right? Well, unfortunately, in Rick Scott's Florida, this basic concept is becoming more and more of a platitude. Once again, I am angered and outraged to find this **[new report in the Orlando Sentinel](https://act.myngp.com/el/VDoGdzJgGfLZWQoR8PHgU8vZc3jKRNntUSkZYjw6mUU=/youzhZon74Velm8sH5_y1vQN_Eiyhf6MwdxupV_QYX4=)** , which details how Governor Scott has used his office to return favors for donors who line his campaign coffers - **all too often investing in their goals over the best interests of our state - and the people who pay the bills for it (you, the tax payer).** Once again, the Governor has chosen to put his friends and favorable special interest groups - who in turn give them large campaign donations - first. This type of pay-to-play politics has made too many people lose their faith in government - and their elected officials. **Public office should mean public trust.** That's one of the reasons why I threw my hat into the "ring" for this race. [Stop Cronyism in the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18](https://act.myngp.com/el/VDoGdzJgGfLZWQoR8PHgU8vZc3jKRNntUSkZYjw6mUU=/UyG5y1PXvHp1sdByynZvNNtfj71e8B-hV5hT7INxR8I=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) As your next CFO, I would make sure that your hard earned money is being spent the way you were promised, by elected officials like Governor Scott, it would be. And I would put an immediate and unequivocable stop to the kind of cheap cronyism we have seen, time and time again, in the cabinet, under the "leadership" of the Governor and the present CFO, Jimmy Patronis. But I have to win this race first. **And to do that, I need your help.** [**Can you make a donation of $20.18 or more today to help me get the Cabinet back to work -- and working for you?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VDoGdzJgGfLZWQoR8PHgU8vZc3jKRNntUSkZYjw6mUU=/UyG5y1PXvHp1sdByynZvNNtfj71e8B-hV5hT7INxR8I=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: The White House
subject: Ivanka Trump announces a new White House initiative
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=647432192b4e70572267491fbd0e3452ec4e919cf82569a47b8fe1ad2cd1b33aec3a21ab8ec351e86be7a025eb87ffed574fbef0f234bd05) The White House • July 18, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump is hosting a meeting of his Cabinet, where he will discuss the results of his foreign trip to Europe and preview a new White House workforce initiative. |
---
|

## Ivanka Trump announces a new White House initiative
**“The assembly line, energy plant and retail store** have changed dramatically in the past 25 years--and the jobs have, too,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes in _The Wall Street Journal_. “Nearly 1 in 5 working Americans has a job that didn’t exist in 1980 . . . Such rapid change is one reason 6.6 million U.S. jobs are currently unfilled.”
**On President Trump’s watch** , the U.S. economy is adding tons of jobs--about 3 million since Inauguration Day 2017, to be exact. Many of these jobs require reskilling workers.
**In the past, that hasn’t happened**. “For too long, both the public and the private sectors have failed to develop innovative and effective training programs,” Ms. Trump writes. But a new Executive Order from President Trump tomorrow will help change that. In partnership with a growing list of companies and organizations, the White House’s latest initiative will set the stage for developing a National strategy for training and retraining American workers.
[Ivanka Trump: Training for the jobs of tomorrow ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=647432192b4e7057dc2d184eb2397e78c116c5e27933c7423dfd9f0c6c8bb710aaced7b1c5a1a854cb3e47c5e90eeaf7a32cfeb9046d7efa)
**New White House report** : [Addressing America’s reskilling challenge ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=647432192b4e70570578817705c7bc309679682baf28f506574c1dfbea2f539fcd216d14d682ceeac3657bac780c8195628a8633b2e8f2dd)

---
|

## How President Trump is defending our election system
**In his bilateral meeting** with Russian President Vladimir Putin this week, President Trump called out Russian efforts to undermine the United States. “During today’s meeting, I addressed directly with President Putin the issue of Russian interference in our elections,” President Trump said. “I felt this was a message best delivered in person.”
**From the beginning of his Administration** , President Trump has taken action to defend our election system from meddling. In March, the Administration imposed sanctions against 16 Russian entities and individuals for their roles in Russian interference in the 2016 election. The President also ordered the expulsion of 48 Russian intelligence officers from the United States in response to Russia’s use of a chemical weapon in the United Kingdom.
**President Trump believes in smart engagement** with Russia to promote peace and security. Meanwhile, his actions show that bold, one-on-one diplomacy goes hand-in-hand with taking a strong stand to confront all direct threats to the American homeland.
[President Trump is standing up to Russia’s malign activities. Learn how. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=647432192b4e70577478b075fbca426862de40575062897f29b2a991147d63ce1c2c0054bf175d71d350cb5d1f5801715b8599d482233b7d)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump board Air Force One** | July 16, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=647432192b4e705739acb05054d4740ed1fb7517c6386eb67cceee714ca874db7331ca2ebd0dc96eea7f6c175c1c2d32255508a5e8cc5bda) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=647432192b4e7057910ed95d0c08a626212ae38641d747f38fff959b6c762c33855e93dc515451932b73615a2c83d3b232d29addb1ffdc18) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d41c279fec4e0ef7d5fd2a10327bc1596d3053b220fc72064b3c5d0c34394038524d69f82820d4c767bfdab9e8254b53a159d54cbd150be294)
---

name: Max Harris
subject: [one-question poll] Make your voice heard now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Here's what you need to know about Rep. Jackie Walorski, Mel's opponent in Indiana's 2nd District:

* Jackie has raised hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC money -- and it shows in her repeated votes to put corporate special interests ahead of hardworking Hoosier families.

* She's taken thousands of dollars from the NRA and has an "A" rating for siding with the gun lobby rather than supporting common sense solutions to reduce gun violence.

* She voted against protecting people with preexisting conditions.

**Beating an incumbent is never easy and we need a huge show of support to prove Hoosiers are ready to elect Mel Hall and flip this district blue. Will you tell us right now whether you support Mel Hall 's campaign to defeat Jackie Walorski?**

name: Team Spanberger
subject: July Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| |
---
### Blue Action Network Training Day

### Chesterfield County Democrats Champions Dinner with Rep. Donald McEachin, Delegate Dawn Adams, and Senator Tim Kaine

### Team Spanberger and Supporters at the Culpeper 4th of July Parade

### Volunteer Selfie!
****
### Celebrating Sikh Awareness Month at the State Capitol with Gov. Ralph Northam

### Meeting with the VA Democratic Party's AFL-CIO Labor Council

### It's A Toss Up!
###
### See more photos on [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/xPj1gl9NDDEEvwaSqYtD6lkM3H4UlRQcshUHw7bIPMQ=), [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/RR2ymE1bSGe5MFyXPeM3MnKkSFan__nxoq9e_MqtkRg=), and [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/aKdeFlqaMMp9t2i17D_xUbc3cXnrrigH4sQfHZqNjyk=).
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/qN_DkCjgc8cOWiZ-gWjDSKaEBn8jiVMcQ9qkjWkUqPk=?refcode=july18newsletter) | News What a month it's been since our June primary win! The excitement for our campaign continues to grow as our path to victory in November becomes increasingly clear to the voters of the 7th District, as well as election analysts and the national media. This seat hasn't been held by a Democrat since 1971, and to the great excitement of our team and our supporters, the 7th District is now rated as a "Toss-Up" by both The Cook Political Report and national political analyst Larry Sabato!
On June 28th, Governor Ralph Northam endorsed our campaign. This month, our campaign was also endorsed by Virginia American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations (VA AFL-CIO) as well as the National Women's Political Caucus (NWPC). These endorsements show the growing confidence in our ability to beat Rep. Brat in November.

Fundraising We are happy to report another strong fundraising quarter. Fundraising is fundamental to our operation because it enables us to reach voters through mailers and TV and keeps our strong operation going. In total, we have raised over $1.3 million, which is more than any Democratic candidate has ever raised in the history of Virginia's 7th District. We have also raised more money this cycle than Congressman Brat has! We need to keep going and we expect our opponent will receive additional help, but we are off to a strong start in the general election!

We are most proud that of all the dollars we've raised, 75% are from Virginia and 45.6% are from the 7th District. Our voters and fellow Virginians have built our foundation of support! Additionally, 74% of all of our donations were $25 or less!

Volunteers
The excitement for our race is reflected across the district by the ever-growing number of volunteers joining our campaign. In February, we were excited to announce nearly 600 volunteers had signed up to help the campaign. Only 5 months later, we now have over 1,900+ Team Spanberger volunteers working throughout the 7th District knocking on doors, making calls to voters, and spreading the word about our campaign. As we've said from day one of this campaign, our volunteers are the grass roots foundation of our efforts and our victory in November will be due to their hard work and dedication.

If you would like to join the team, please sign up on our volunteer list[ here](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/X3A5dAAU_yobqQ9OoocbHaoKT7qNGPbXH9-BBEAkKhA=) or jump right in by picking a day to door knock or phone bank[ here](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/EBZIYbrsIgGFNRNOMcwWYkBtecKlcvshxswTtMaX8VQ=)!

For volunteer-related questions, please email our Regional Field Director, MacKenzie Miller at [mackenzie@abigailspanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/OeC96g8Gb8vsBFyGmSkQNXsJhSwsTYWafAyA1wpQwMA=)

Events
We hope you enjoyed your 4th of July celebrations. Our team had a blast marching in multiple parades, attending cookouts, and meeting Central Virginia families across the 7th district. If you did not get a chance to see Team Spanberger on the 4th, check out our recap video [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/6g19vUhb5257l1wwVKJL9vOsAGI29T51B9HaNfl_ld4=).

We're continuing to plan more events for the summer. Please stay tuned to our [Events Page](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/1B0vjGcLRgnwIDFnohO7R14CQoKdGmY0rUEf0-kfmww=?ref=page_internal) on Facebook and our[ Events Calendar](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/uFLg366VhNd3jZNvHHDaFMijfeP5MQGIMg93aEeB-Yc=) on our campaign website for updates on new events. Events for July include:
Community Gathering at Hardywood West Creek This is a family friendly event and a great opportunity to meet Abigail for anyone who hasn't already. Invite your friends and neighbors! Wednesday July 18th 5:30 PM to 7:30 PM 820 Sanctuary Trail Drive, Richmond, VA, 23238 [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/9H7ggXneMkXAbVLDbPFzeqWthTDbMcpTbJOY9-881XU=)

Glen Allen Reception Wednesday July 25th 6:00 PM to 7:30 PM [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/0NPOlgW8n6mIzK4IMaPsGTBYtKFBzlmLzMH8PmBJBt0=) for the address

Henrico Meet and Greet Saturday July 28th 12:30 PM to 2:00 PM 8357 Charing Lane, Glen Allen, VA, 23059 [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/JitwfG6qKJHx8F4G-5-25nUyAxbUSYGUwq8Xl2nb0U8=)

In the Media
New York Magazine,[ Primaries Set Up Big General Election Battles](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/e4yZxDeUEfa81L7-wKSc1WYCjcuZYCHNY1GhaVf1dNw=)

The Hill,[ Dave Brat's seat moved to 'toss-up' 4 years after upset victory over Eric Cantor](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/_-xguJLv4eW4WaBZ1CupeArUsldY-H1OuZDNDMNscw8=)

The Washington Post,[ On the "flip list": Dave Brat and Barbara Comstock](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/Y7_5qVMQi-zH02ogqxA_6NwjVMHBob1OPqN7D6Na7gc=?noredirect=on&utm_term=.faed65eb493c)

Richmond2Day, [Abigail Spanberger produces record-breaking fundraising numbers in new filing](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/FhP-xVFw2IfSuG-lx66A77f1fZ-bhBbOOqTBB7SYBHs=)

The Cook Political Report,[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/IDyrmcPlDD4TA5rJfJL5POQ324BD-Mz5zvqn7QilPVI=)[VA-07: Brat Moves from Lean Republican to Toss Up](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/IDyrmcPlDD4TA5rJfJL5POQ324BD-Mz5zvqn7QilPVI=)
See you around the neighborhood, and thank you for your continued support of our campaign.

-Team Spanberger

P.S.

Thank you to all our supporters who have brought snacks to our campaign headquarters. You keep the campaign going!
#

---|---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/j4VRS3MPo2IUDhgJlaiA2DE2lsNHK5B6caasaCN5UP0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0inHyml3SM9U8RswjIi87B6Bg7ckDKT8spqK_hD2a0=/xfOVOG1ShF-0-IAehJTvGbL0ve929PXRQqKCMxFZofA=) | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Sign the Petition to Slash UN Funding!
body:
| | [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=KIV3qK7sNplylkn0EPuREQ)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Our politicians continue to pour your tax money into the United Nations. When will they learn that the American people are sick and tired of throwing billions of dollars into this black hole of waste, fraud, and abuse?! [**Please sign the National Petition ordering Congress to slash U.S. funding for this wasteful, bloated, anti-American bureaucracy. Washington needs to hear from you right now.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=sVQ_YeSS11FVpajZ6PEu9Q) [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=U3bImT658S8xTALJyBZWoQ) **The Council for Citizens Against Government Waste** has been battling out-of-control spending and taxes since 1984. But nothing gets on our nerves more than the federal government wasting billions and billions of our tax dollars to prop up the den of bureaucrats, crooks, dictators, and thieves at the UN who propagandize and work against America's security and economic interests. **Enough is enough!** **With Donald Trump in the White House, we have an unprecedented opportunity to drastically slash U.S. funding of the bloated and wasteful United Nations.** In fact, last year the Trump Administration negotiated a $600 million reduction in the UN's 2017 peacekeeping budget and a $285 million reduction in the UN's 2018-2019 operating budget. This was a much-needed down payment toward reducing our UN funding. But to make significant cuts to the estimated **__$10 BILLION__** that the U.S. spends on the UN each year, we need to telegraph to our lawmakers that this is a top priority for American taxpayers, which is why I need your signature right now! [**Just click here to sign the National Petition to Congress. We must act quickly to capitalize on last year's progress and ensure Congress doesn't send yet another giant check to the UN.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=6RdgtBuSyBwVRhZCmJAAhw) The estimated $10 BILLION Americans pay to the UN each year includes our massive annual dues payment, plus 29 percent of the UN’s peacekeeping budget, as well as “voluntary payments” for special UN programs and funds. American taxpayers pay as much as _**25 percent**_ of all UN expenses. _In fact, we pay more than all of the other permanent members of the Security Council COMBINED!_ [**This nonsense must stop. Please sign your Petition now.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=_kx9OSayFu3mCuaT3enMug) And what do we get for the billions of dollars that we send to the UN? Here are just a few examples of what your money is paying for:
* The UN's World Health Organization routinely has spent about **$200 million** a year on **travel expenses** – more than what it doles out to fight some of the biggest problems in public health, including AIDS, hepatitis, tuberculosis, and malaria combined;
* Former UN Secretary General Boutros Boutros-Ghali has admitted that "perhaps half of the UN workforce does nothing useful."
* **Third World dictators routinely fly to UN headquarters in New York to attack our great country and undermine our national interests;** and,
* UN-funded "peacekeeping" troops have abused the people they are supposed to be protecting and created a deadly and costly cholera epidemic in Haiti that has killed 9,000 so far and sickened 800,000.

_Adding insult to injury, the UN sent a five-page memo to the Trump Administration warning that the repeal of Obamacare would put the U.S. "at odds with its international obligations" and could violate "the right to social security of the people in the United States_." American taxpayers should not be paying for this hypocrisy, waste, and abuse. [**That's why it's so important that you sign your Petition right now.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=ez1p9a0SLI3qU4JjS-pMdw) | [**Sign the Petition**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=eCCu_dctDDDGaDPStVB8vQ)
---
Members of Congress need to know that this issue is of the utmost importance for the American people. [**Just click here to make your voice heard.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=Mo8MxgV_9dS_8MB3ssy48Q)
And please, please ask everyone you know to sign this National Petition as well.
**If we don't stand up now, Congress will continue wasting our tax dollars on the UN year after year.**
[**Sign your Petition. Tell Congress to slash U.S. funding for the UN!**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9zbGFzaF91bl9mdW5kaW5nX2M0L0dPUDY5MDM&K=AbKBoSpHmEnGX8Aj77gEvw)
Thank you for your help.
Sincerely,
Thomas A. Schatz
President
Council for Citizens Against Government Waste
The Council for Citizens Against Government Waste (CCAGW) is the lobbying arm of Citizens Against Government Waste (CAGW), the nation's largest taxpayer watchdog organization with more than 1 million members and supporters nationwide. CCAGW is a 501(c)(4) nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that lobbies for legislation to eliminate waste, fraud, abuse, and mismanagement in government. Contributions to CCAGW are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. For more information about CCAGW, visit [www.ccagw.org](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2NjYWd3Lm9yZw&K=mA85M4G8Gsb2g32MoN8Wzw). [Make a contribution today to support CCAGW's efforts to rein in wasteful deficit spending](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTk5LTQwM2FiYTUyZWQ1YzQ1NjViY2EwNjM5ZGMxNGUxNDU5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9jY2Fndy9kb25hdGUvR09QNjkwMw&K=Dqb8grahuAQLttEYJK6khg).

|

name: Austin Petersen
subject: I am furious with Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hello Friend, Please forgive me for this rant, but I am furious with Josh Hawley \- so I am going to call him out. Recently, Josh Hawley accepted five invitations to debate and forums with Claire McCaskill. So far, McCaskill has turned them all down. Hawley released a press release railing against her for not accepting any of the debates. Josh Hawley is a coward and a total hypocrite. Hawley complaining that McCaskill will not accept an invitation to a debate is simply outrageous. He has rejected EVERY SINGLE debate I have challenged him to - debates organized by grassroots organizations all throughout the state. He refuses to engage in the GOP primary and now he has gall to complain about McCaskill skipping debates. Such a classic politician move. I am tired of his hypocrisy, cowardice, and ladder climbing. [**Awhile ago I sent around a petition demanding that Josh Hawley agree to a debate with me. Please sign it by clicking here. If Josh Hawley wants a debate I will debate him. Add your name by clicking here >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/demand_josh_hawley_debate?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=071818_debate&n=1) This is not the only outrageous thing to happen on the Josh Hawley campaign in the past two weeks. The Missouri GOP voted in a closed door meeting of the executive committee to allow the RNC and state party to contribute to Josh Hawley’s failing campaign to the tune of millions of dollars. There are three reasons why this is unfair to voters, party activists, and donors to the MO GOP.

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Defend our Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z08BSfhfoPPiW32AwyU5FJkJApX-_LmAlY4lPI7Y1jI=/A_OCW5I2qFAJ5SjXyMhEjVdnCBGzGr3Hyfs8B_P1fIc=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180702_JM_eoq2ty_all_logo)
Friends,
On Monday, we watched dumbfounded as our President equivocated between the findings of our intelligence community and the word of a dictator and war criminal.
On Tuesday, we watched Tom McClintock, our current US representative, applaud the President's effort as "diplomacy."
Today, we are taking a stand for our democracy. McClintock, apparently will not. [Will you? Join me.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z08BSfhfoPPiW32AwyU5FJkJApX-_LmAlY4lPI7Y1jI=/Z__Oaijo4zBJs7PXcLqMRfnCBuvr7OUlSXR2Nwt0PzI=)
Our law enforcement and intelligence agencies announced that Russia launched a deliberate attack on our electoral process. But McClintock doubled down, praising Trump for "avoiding insulting Putin" It's not an insult to signal to our adversaries that America will not tolerate clandestine attacks on our democracy. The full weight of American outrage should have been conveyed to Russia. Our troops have sacrificed too much for us to give a foreign adversary a pass.
I have never wavered from my oath to "defend our constitution against all enemies foreign and domestic," and this week we saw patriots, across the political spectrum regardless of party, speak out demanding that we defend our constitution. Leaders from both parties, in a rare moment of unity, came to the defense of our country. Yet McClintock chose to appease a dictator rather than stand up for our national security and free and fair elections. He has failed his oath.
What distinguishes the US from Russia, is that when a political leader fails to act in the interest of our country, we have the power to stand up, speak out, and vote for the change we deserve.
[Stand up. Speak out. Help me vote McClintock out of office.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z08BSfhfoPPiW32AwyU5FJkJApX-_LmAlY4lPI7Y1jI=/Z__Oaijo4zBJs7PXcLqMRfnCBuvr7OUlSXR2Nwt0PzI=)
If we, as McClintock suggests, allow Russia's attack on our election to go unchecked, then we are inviting them to undermine the very fundamentals of our democracy. This cannot stand.
[Help us defeat McClintock in November and defend our democracy](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z08BSfhfoPPiW32AwyU5FJkJApX-_LmAlY4lPI7Y1jI=/Z__Oaijo4zBJs7PXcLqMRfnCBuvr7OUlSXR2Nwt0PzI=)[.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z08BSfhfoPPiW32AwyU5FJkJApX-_LmAlY4lPI7Y1jI=/Z__Oaijo4zBJs7PXcLqMRfnCBuvr7OUlSXR2Nwt0PzI=)
\- Jessica
[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z08BSfhfoPPiW32AwyU5FJkJApX-_LmAlY4lPI7Y1jI=/Z__Oaijo4zBJs7PXcLqMRfnCBuvr7OUlSXR2Nwt0PzI=)
---

Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign.
---
Jessica Morse for Congress
1079 Sunrise Ave
Ste B 275
Roseville CA 95611 United States

name: Peter Joffrion
subject: I want to know what’s important to you
body:
Hello there --
Sometimes it can be tough to keep up with what’s important when the news cycle spends so much time covering what's being said on Twitter. I wanted to share what I’ve been following in the news over the past couple weeks:
* Recently, the Trump administration has imposed tariffs on steel and aluminum imports. Now, Canada has retaliated with $12.6 billion in tariffs against American-made products and China retaliated with $34 billion in tariffs of its own -- including tariffs on soybean imports.
* This year, Alabama had the fourth largest increase in FAFSA completions in the nation. Our completions went up by 4.8 percent, while the national average was 1.9 percent. I'm reminded of the importance of supporting students across the district with federal funding for Pell Grants.
* In a press conference with Russian President Vladimir Putin, President Trump refused to back his own intelligence team over Putin and said that Russia did not interfere in our elections despite seventeen U.S. intelligence groups stating Russia did interfere in the 2016 election. Trump and his staff have since claimed he “misspoke,” but his statements since have been superficial at best and have done nothing to demonstrate his confidence in and commitment to our intelligence community.

My team and I got together to figure out a way to learn more about your priorities and how I can fight for you in Washington. Today, we’re compiling feedback from supporters like you for our July issues survey. Could you spare a short moment to add your thoughts?
Your response to surveys like this one helps make me a better, more responsive candidate and leader -- I want to know where you stand.
We kept it short and it shouldn’t take much longer than a minute to complete the survey. You can even answer the first question by clicking below:
**Q1: What is the single most important issue to you right now?**
**[Ensuring quality and accessible healthcare for everybody](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676029/8924720/1992815274?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzZjhhYi1jMThhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNRf547fnB-7FgMajeDfIaVXHRpfZPxhl7Hj4pGkbXE=)**
**[Making college affordable ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676030/8924721/1992815274?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzZjhhYi1jMThhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNRf547fnB-7FgMajeDfIaVXHRpfZPxhl7Hj4pGkbXE=)**
**[Investing in our roads, bridges, and railways ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676031/8924722/1992815274?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzZjhhYi1jMThhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNRf547fnB-7FgMajeDfIaVXHRpfZPxhl7Hj4pGkbXE=)**
**[Creating good jobs and strengthening our economy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676032/8924723/1992815274?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzZjhhYi1jMThhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNRf547fnB-7FgMajeDfIaVXHRpfZPxhl7Hj4pGkbXE=)**
**[Strengthening our public schools](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676033/8924724/1992815274?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzZjhhYi1jMThhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNRf547fnB-7FgMajeDfIaVXHRpfZPxhl7Hj4pGkbXE=)**
**[Other](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676034/8924725/1992815274?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmYzZjhhYi1jMThhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNRf547fnB-7FgMajeDfIaVXHRpfZPxhl7Hj4pGkbXE=)**
My team will compile survey results later this week, so make sure to share your positions and input before time runs out. I really want to hear from you, friend.
Thank you,
Peter

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen 2018
subject: We just opened our books
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team --
On Monday, we announced our FEC report on fundraising for the second quarter (which ended last month), and here’s what we found: Our campaign had 35% more in donations than the previous quarter.
**Our momentum is growing, and the Washington establishment is in shock.**
Tennesseans from all backgrounds are coming together and [**chipping in $5 or whatever they can to prove to the Washington establishment they want an end to the partisan division and gridlock — and like you, they’re willing to work for it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676419/8926509/-1320912711?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE0M2NiZC1jNDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DOXhb4qeUsUjcYwhArZkylycKaTo4jQAdj-K-h7eBIc=&refcode=em180718-fec-miss&recurring=true)
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676421/8926511/-1320912711?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE0M2NiZC1jNDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DOXhb4qeUsUjcYwhArZkylycKaTo4jQAdj-K-h7eBIc=&refcode=em180718-fec-miss&recurring=true)****
**But we know what’s coming next.**
Our opponents have made clear that they’ll stop at nothing to tear Governor Bredesen down and drag this race into the mud — their top strategist described their campaign plan like this: **“We’re going to constantly punch him in his face... over and over and over again.”**
In the final months of this campaign, they’re going to flood TVs, phones, and computers with the same partisan rancor they’ve used to paralyze and divide Congress. We need to keep stepping up and getting to work so we can keep this race focused on the issues that matter to Tennessee families.
That means opening campaign offices across the state, fielding volunteers, knocking on doors, and making calls in every part of Tennessee so we can tune out the partisan noise coming out of Washington. **That’s why I’m asking:**
[**Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us keep up our momentum? Your support in these past few months has given us the resources we’ve needed to invest in a campaign operation focused on bringing Tennesseans together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676423/8926513/-1320912711?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE0M2NiZC1jNDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DOXhb4qeUsUjcYwhArZkylycKaTo4jQAdj-K-h7eBIc=&refcode=em180718-fec-miss&recurring=true)
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1676425/8926515/-1320912711?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWE0M2NiZC1jNDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DOXhb4qeUsUjcYwhArZkylycKaTo4jQAdj-K-h7eBIc=&refcode=em180718-fec-miss&recurring=true)****
Let’s keep this up.
Bob Corney
Campaign Manager
Bredesen for Senate

name: Elise
subject: Standing up for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Did you see Amy's interview with CNN's Don Lemon earlier this week about President Trump's meeting with Vladimir Putin?
[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=x9sJ6wPjMajkkbaIF3aJ5JYdfciYDJMH)
---
When the President was asked if he believes his intelligence officers or Putin, instead of siding with the Americans who have dedicated their lives to serving our country, he sided with the man who attacked our democracy.

But while our President was standing with Vladimir Putin, Amy was standing with our allies, European Members of Parliament. The world is looking for leadership from the United States and Amy is fighting for our country every day.

[**Will you contribute to help Amy keep fighting in the Senate?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RABlkE1SNLPBcYIvDzYlsJYdfciYDJMH)

Thanks for being on the team, and having Amy's back as she works for us.

\-- Elise

clean_body: Hi, Did you see Amy's interview with CNN's Don Lemon earlier this week about President Trump's meeting with Vladimir Putin? When the President was asked if he believes his intelligence officers or Putin, instead of siding with the Americans who have dedicated their lives to serving our country, he sided with the man who attacked our democracy. But while our President was standing with Vladimir Putin, Amy was standing with our allies, European Members of Parliament. The world is looking for leadership from the United States and Amy is fighting for our country every day. Thanks for being on the team, and having Amy's back as she works for us. \-- Elise **

name: Mac Perlich
subject: Join me Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Dear Friend,

You and I both know that Washington needs new leadership. In a time when partisanship divides us across important issues like promoting the arts and our local economy, I cannot think of a better way to support our community than by electing a candidate who represents our values as well as Greg Stanton.
My husband Russ and I are proud to host a fundraiser at our home for him tomorrow, July 19th, from 5:30 - 7:00 PM and we'd be honored to have you join us. **[Click here to RSVP.](https://act.myngp.com/el/M_XKJltOVxiYTSuOCcPc3xntsmsR3oODPe1HtARq0js=/Ytdm1eG7ei7WOJLbYPLdWeEBoJMLjQ8V1pm1t2xsU8o=?usp=drive_web)**
Greg is the kind of leader that we need in Congress. If you can't attend, please do still consider donating in support of his campaign. [**To donate, click here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/M_XKJltOVxiYTSuOCcPc3xntsmsR3oODPe1HtARq0js=/2R6LOXcrnTpqe8eiCN5v8NkwwzHf9yex0rcT2mO5sQs=?refcode=X_InviteJuly19_c&amount=25&recurring=auto).
If you have any questions please contact Amber at [Amber@StantonforArizona.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/M_XKJltOVxiYTSuOCcPc3xntsmsR3oODPe1HtARq0js=/tmpCZYo333PpTgPj7U38os8r-T2pYZbUpL_rf12HshE=).
Sincerely,
_Mac Perlich_

body:
Peter — Our election is less than 4
months away, and Dan needs your help.

We’re looking for 250 supporters to step up and become the
official Founding Members of Team Lipinski. For over a decade,
Congressman Lipinski has been putting in the time, energy, and
work to fight for Illinois families, and he needs your help to
keep going.

If you’re a supporter of our work to defend working families,
the environment, reliable infrastructure, fighting for affordable
health care, and a host of other critical issues — we need you to
officially activate your membership with Team Lipinski today.

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: your rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Our Second Amendment is one of the most important protections protected by our Constitution. The right to bear arms empowers Americans to take......

Friend,

Our Second Amendment is one of the most important protections protected by our Constitution. The right to bear arms empowers Americans to take action to secure themselves, their property, and their loved ones.

I know how important the Second Amendment is for Wisconsinites, which is why I am – and always have been – 100-percent pro-gun. You can trust me to fight for you because of my proven track record.

In fact, I just received word that the National Rifle Association (NRA) is giving me an “A+” rating and is only endorsing my campaign in the Wisconsin Republican primary for U.S. Senate.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=hp4fmb-t8JAhL8_g7xD_4S4WIBUF0RBLaMwXACChx6K-W1aUSaBAFVkpIu4y8hBYRm6e8mZYAEUtdw9gu0JEOpsaatXT6rrOVk4jX1rT2b2pPH8SiinD7K53732GbfVuabnhE-ubNYxxPRwH0ZgtntTslWdJ98IuGesbZJEvCfGwAkoK7v7LkWhmHvVQ1isZk_tNVl6iOp7oe7WcO6YHVT9oiKNCWPxUCchB-mGBW-1bgdUjG6eGKIqC5CwIILcoAoMYNhc4p90WBN4HhDm84IcKddglQ4JeULgYNEaCQgpUuHhFB2EBb0qlFRT_xu02rulMzJEVf4WAJ95iPS905MM8Mf2xZXl2zaQ-RlCqdu9p4kdYTYmvCzHBEP4mENj2z9kONGVfzoT_rk-Ws5hBpyg97zekdjEqcCqKvjSzLZM%3D)

Friend, Tammy Baldwin and her far-left supporters want to rewrite our laws to disarm law-abiding citizens, leaving everyone defenseless – except for criminals who don’t follow laws in the first place.

The safety of our schools, homes, and communities depends on fighting for our Second Amendment rights – and I’m a fighter. I won’t let Tammy’s liberal supporters take away our rights.

[Protect the 2nd Amendment: Stand with Leah](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=hp4fmb-t8JAhL8_g7xD_4S4WIBUF0RBLaMwXACChx6K-W1aUSaBAFVkpIu4y8hBYRm6e8mZYAEUtdw9gu0JEOpsaatXT6rrOVk4jX1rT2b2pPH8SiinD7K53732GbfVuabnhE-ubNYxxPRwH0ZgtntTslWdJ98IuGesbZJEvCfGwAkoK7v7LkWhmHvVQ1isZ_xS5Ip-0ICAvDqBUgEug-ljkdn8ed9mLfUzp4dCJOa3lSabDygsUIcwkdHyhLAIjBnGULwCMT0aBNlcfCioE_q92yfLouWqJ69Fhz1iSiQyI95v2SjYuXTtXvwnFZfIeJigxwKudoAXrPbIC911APON9NJfeA9Gho76WVUo1J-hEXFgfpNqlJh0awPB7Gzu4G8ARYfxCYTkK4wLmu66CaHEy6yhxduNhCkR9HEFXLn0%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=KzNq3knRgsw5qunYWQpO2RxJNjquuWEd1djYwrh8UH1_rF_fOv2yi6DW5uLDbHk2adT4sYXpZVCZL1o-VqOAjHuj6azOMiYJ1M4yWNhPvkxCqFTyG516VC00CysSHSZQTNrIiIPxWbNwnC41SXyrB5tyEpTNRQUXURBuWq2yUGhbyXrx8QHHYQci7S5Fj3trQjUt4MfF8uPVval85GDJkEHuMAZOMWOGXpsl-qB2fRXHGSbRgOL-ywNPN9uNFTrD). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=hp4fmb-t8JAhL8_g7xD_4WgAZrnqBXAZv-I5lSizBQ-Q-hkHb158CSguGgfbZnvvV6WRccMFpckO6LtnbneT_NXvHWShqGl2s_wLoXbI0PuNvpX_2FxX7Mg72QO4c3kepFl1FOuUvcsPU2qickri1J1tvAzcc8KK6lWqzGtbmBBOGGclA-1siVFwNFTz5nCtBE0UwzTq0rURelbT_3vj611xc7mLhFiBLhkw7WA5w---uIuAB4LkAJVrvpatUG62NZniVZPWRZKSV0n-n_T90Mk1Ornd1hflxHXCNDUPllFzVs4-C24ERiyZoMq84DftaVlYR3lejPKuWf-l5xmbIsHbsgHvP3_Vlz0evJqob1aOw-gFR2bLlYWgdmrfs_Uq) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=hp4fmb-t8JAhL8_g7xD_4WgAZrnqBXAZv-I5lSizBQ_mYBmtYK__jPW23VOL_FmUzYI3T7NFWqV6khsO6-TApEtGiqx3uLEIHB6xJ9O6AH8TWm5JlkFJ4lXjq-dckpa0dQPayGUmbbzsQolIsUW3-GtjoMLeRvsnCBFm9KpVJ5OgWOBm3FN1VGY4qqvifJgxaxmqZz54Ax84TSVoaYKQ5bKtG2VqlHZCfWpreDEOV72t3pCxxhn-FgQ09XEZSwbNA6tMuLOjQJQ_LHAJbtGi2nOlBnY-Dn87cwFq2ONjhFBjg938G2HTiLlbLcY0qaEuzTo8lsnXiccV26ULZYO_HjBR-YhpvXyrNJKZMXn-HRZCLt4Kan5CK3PeyQ2r0_rc) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=hp4fmb-t8JAhL8_g7xD_4allIfa98_FXHWgqARaJ_S8bM0s8xM4AEsFq1w4bgS_QP8jZohaWPWPEHTNWmQZQ69UpIxLGxjiWH0ALC9d0Bou2t8QRUeaHbDDVtps2wxfo600MzvqjVsk4rRQcrXeU2aFQO5cwjD_OjzGGSddzgHsMVHsgah3LWEhFU-5cumL5BV4zGXcbzing86ZRGcDtxr1e4itiLCOMaEPZKbot9mG9Ei9Ny969Mmt_pTCuDvVhFbJkeHpKuQpdONS9mflMIA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=hp4fmb-t8JAhL8_g7xD_4X8RNgs0eSl9eVxq9HSjs9XW6SHtnjyUdrXeQEBXc8sze38YpXTq6lZUBj8xfg2HZXcwpqFSykwYFVdn3kb37afQ_dKXgTXE0GT020HnPRSc4dvdchvFikMDF_LxnwmiSdT7T6VoARk1IGnaWI7H_34F6aFbc336zlFpZzy67nBJhgtOl7ypqbNGJz0rp-xgymhngg6sYmdrTkbLLxmlM236tgJxCPTtIK168p23k2tz0DGfpqv95UmT_VDjYDT4PQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=hp4fmb-t8JAhL8_g7xD_4RF9EEBYwwauDEdpBw0DGPU4fAM5GHlCKeBKPK1FF6giEEjrj-KaKJo7cwOuQr5qW5UyPBsLCTOP2S8RJMBRaudwRSJVfTxh_luOlSQ0MAqwNtuhJCkInmFtZsaAEcQn0YB-wRTS_1eZYNrdWapdqH6bAjST71XPOH1ljzIOo6N9CMgTbASsi7VAIVG8U3YYgL2LZXxOIcjsbK1afmxTVNivFlUuc5fsexW1fJCdfJIlUaDV07tmEOf5c3bLLT6Xtg%3D%3D) feed. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=KzNq3knRgsw5qunYWQpO2RxJNjquuWEd1djYwrh8UH1_rF_fOv2yi6DW5uLDbHk2adT4sYXpZVCZL1o-VqOAjHuj6azOMiYJ1M4yWNhPvkxCqFTyG516VC00CysSHSZQTNrIiIPxWbNwnC41SXyrB5tyEpTNRQUXURBuWq2yUGhbyXrx8QHHYQci7S5Fj3trQjUt4MfF8uPVval85GDJkEHuMAZOMWOGXpsl-qB2fRXHGSbRgOL-ywNPN9uNFTrD) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a9bf931702534ccda347961f8647a86f&_e=KzNq3knRgsw5qunYWQpO2RxJNjquuWEd1djYwrh8UH1_rF_fOv2yi6DW5uLDbHk2adT4sYXpZVCZL1o-VqOAjHuj6azOMiYJ1M4yWNhPvkxCqFTyG516VC00CysSHSZQTNrIiIPxWbNwnC41SXyrB5tyEpTNRQUXURBuWq2yUGhbyXrx8QHHYQci7S5Fj3trQjUt4MfF8uPVval85GDJkEHuMAZOMWOGXpsl-qB2fRXHGSbRgOL-ywNPN9uNFTrD) to unsubscribe. clean_body: Our Second Amendment is one of the most important protections protected by our Constitution. The right to bear arms empowers Americans to take...... Friend, Our Second Amendment is one of the most important protections protected by our Constitution. The right to bear arms empowers Americans to take action to secure themselves, their property, and their loved ones. I know how important the Second Amendment is for Wisconsinites, which is why I am – and always have been – 100-percent pro-gun. You can trust me to fight for you because of my proven track record. In fact, I just received word that the National Rifle Association (NRA) is giving me an “A+” rating and is only endorsing my campaign in the Wisconsin Republican primary for U.S. Senate. Friend, Tammy Baldwin and her far-left supporters want to rewrite our laws to disarm law-abiding citizens, leaving everyone defenseless – except for criminals who don’t follow laws in the first place. The safety of our schools, homes, and communities depends on fighting for our Second Amendment rights – and I’m a fighter. I won’t let Tammy’s liberal supporters take away our rights. I’m happy to have the NRA on board. -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Regina Bateson
subject: The right voice at the right time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Team,
You stood shoulder-to-shoulder with #TeamBateson through the primary, and our journey isn’t over. Now it’s time to join #TeamMorse and work together to defeat Tom McClintock. That means getting back out there to talk to our neighbors and friends -- putting in the hard work necessary to flip our district.
We need you to help us bring it home. Sign up to volunteer with #TeamMorse today! [https://www.morse4congress.com/volunteer/]
I encourage you to join Jessica Morse's email list [https://www.morse4congress.com/join-team-morse] to keep up to date on her campaign. Please sign up to volunteer [https://www.morse4congress.com/volunteer/] with her campaign as well. This district can only be won if we all work together.
If everyone on this team steps up to do their part, we can make a real difference at this critical moment in history.
Once you’ve signed up with #TeamMorse, please forward this email to three family members or friends who may be wondering how to get involved in #CA04. We need everyone engaged and working toward our shared goal of unseating Tom McClintock.
Thank you for all that you do,
Regina
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62063/images/Regina%20Bateson%20for%20Congress%20logo.png]Regina is running for Congress in California’s highly competitive 4th Congressional District.
Help spread the word! Forward this email to 5 friends to help Regina’s grassroots campaign grow.
Regina can’t win this race without support from people like you. Join her people-powered movement by contributing here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-footer?&amount=25.00&recurring=true]
You can also get involved by following Regina on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/bateson2018/] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/bateson2018?lang=en] If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, click below.
Checks may be made payable to: Bateson for Congress, PO BOX 1130 Roseville, CA, 95678
Paid for by Bateson for Congress

name: Ryan Mulcahy
subject: this is what we're up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It's official: The far-right is coming after Tom.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633880/1a8421e1/1a4e73d7a/484a2484/3232171054/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")

Hey there, team. I want to make sure you have a chance to read the news below. It's official: The far-right is coming after Tom. **Now, they 're spending money to run ads on TV, boosting their hyper-partisan agenda._Next, they 're going to go after Tom's independent record to mislead voters across our district so they can replace him with a rubber-stamp._** We can't let that happen. [**Can you make a grassroots donation today so we 're prepared to fight back?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.18_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager \------forwarded message------ From: Team O'Halleran Subject: the far-right ON TV _**Breaking News:**_ One of Tom's opponents is up on TV with a NEW AD --and it shows she'll be a rubber stamp for the far-right. [**Arizona families deserve an independent voice fighting for them in Congress. CHIP IN to re-elect Tom and keep AZ-01 blue >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.18_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
* * *

Team, We told you this race would heat up over the summer. Well, it's happening now. **While Tom is focused on serving Arizona families in Congress, our opponents are engaged in a race to the right ahead of their primary election next month --_and now they 're taking the fight to the airwaves._** One of Tom's far-right opponents is up with a new ad touting her commitment to the GOP's extreme partisan agenda. And we're still over three months out from Election Day, so there are many more ads from the far-right to come. [**Tom is THE MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the entire House, which means we don 't have any time to waste -- _we need to fight back against the far-right TODAY:_**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.18_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | ****[Stop the far-right: CHIP IN>>](http://action.tomohalleran. Team O'Halleran

subject: 48 hours to reach our goal--Can you contribute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri |
body:
{{Friends}},

With 20 days until the primary election, and such a critical House seat on the line, we really do need your help.

We can remove the Representative who isn’t accountable to the people of Missouri’s 2nd District. We can put leaders in Congress who listen and stand up for us. We can show the current Republican-controlled Congress that we won’t stand by while they consistently put profits and power over the fundamental needs of the people.

This is a grassroots campaign: we are focused on knocking on doors, calling voters, and connecting with people who want to see real change in this district. But to get everyone to polls in this crucial midterm, we need to raise the money to spread Mark’s message to as many voters as possible.

Our finance team has set a fundraising goal for the next 2 days:

Can you help us raise $5,500 in the next 48 hours?

Thank you for all your support. Let’s go win this together: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markformissouri

The Mark Osmack Team

| Paid for by Osmack for Missouri |

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: an independent investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
It is imperative that we protect the Special Counsel's investigation and the men responsible for it, Mueller and Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein. |
---

| | | Peter, when former FBI Director Robert Mueller was appointed as Special Counsel to oversee the investigation into Russia's interference in our elections, I said we needed to follow the facts wherever they may lead.

I still believe that. And that's why -- in light of Monday's press conference with President Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin -- **it is imperative that we protect the Special Counsel 's investigation and the men responsible for it, Mueller and Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein.**
**DEFEND A THOROUGH, INDEPENDENT INVESTIGATION INTO RUSSIA 'S ACTIONS.**
[**Sign your name if you agree >>>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e89/7377f838/3d96d9f0/51f9e4f5/1993943392/VEsH/ "https://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/support-the-independent-investigation")
At the summit, President Trump chose to stand with Putin over his own intelligence community, which was a blow to our national security that may empower Russia to attempt to interfere with our elections once again. This is unacceptable.

[**Protect the investigation and let the facts lead where they may. Sign your name here >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e89/7377f838/3d96d9f0/51f9e4f5/1993943392/VEsE/ "https://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/support-the-independent-investigation")

Thanks as always,
Joe
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e89/7377f838/3d96d9f0/51f9e4f4/1993943392/VEsF/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Michael Logan
subject: Supporting Dr. Ward for U.S. Senate!
body:
|
---
N/A --

Good evening,

With the primary election getting closer, and early ballots coming out on August 1st, we need to do everything we can to support Dr. Kelli Ward!

Dr. Ward has been working tirelessly to get elected, and now it is up to us to fight together with her to win this critical U.S. Senate seat – and finally get an Arizona Senator who supports President Trump and the America First agenda.

We need to take action, from knocking doors and making calls to setting up yard signs and campaigning on social media. So, we are looking for volunteers to come out and knock doors with us this coming Saturday:

**Time:** 8-10 AM, Saturday
**Meet at Campaign HQ:**[2020 S McClintock Dr, Tempe, AZ 85282](https://www.wardforarizona.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmaps.google.com%2F%3Fq%3D2020%2BS%2BMcClintock%2BDr%2C%2BTempe%2C%2BAZ%2B85282%26entry%3Dgmail%26source%3Dg&e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=encouragement&n=1)
**Phone:** Michael Logan – (562) 879-9888; Jinhui Chen – (734) 262-0262

Please reply to this email or let Mike Logan know if you are can come.

Thank you for your time - we always appreciate your support and work for Dr. Kelli Ward! Jinhui Chen (P.S Don't forget to join us this Wednesday to make phone calls with us in the office!)

Michael Logan
[http://www.wardforarizona.com/](http://www.wardforarizona.com/?e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=encouragement&n=2)
Kelli Ward for Senate, Inc. · United States
