Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.wardforarizona.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fnationbuilder.com&e=fa6f97f500b2dd17f5e159d2d0c5907d&utm_source=kelliward&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=encouragement&n=4), software for leaders.

name: Mike Siegel
subject: The attacks are coming; help me prepare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1678032/8934227/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkNTg3ZC1lMDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUeqXIy85YfkHY4on7Lriv4AFMG__AvpLdXeKl-s4s0=)
Join our team! [Volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1678033/8934228/-1214481066?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkNTg3ZC1lMDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUeqXIy85YfkHY4on7Lriv4AFMG__AvpLdXeKl-s4s0=) or [donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1678034/8934229/1664269967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkNTg3ZC1lMDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUeqXIy85YfkHY4on7Lriv4AFMG__AvpLdXeKl-s4s0=).
---
Peter, Today, a local supporter received a call from a "research firm" in Houston. The firm asked questions about the Texas 10th Congressional District, emphasizing my opponent's claimed accomplishments. The firm also suggested I had "put criminals back in the streets" in my previous work as a civil rights lawyer. **This is the first attack against me, and unlikely to be the last**. We can see McCaul is going to use the same hateful rhetoric that is too common today. **McCaul wants voters to believe that when[I fought against](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1678035/8934230/546332573?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkNTg3ZC1lMDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUeqXIy85YfkHY4on7Lriv4AFMG__AvpLdXeKl-s4s0=&oid=2335249) [a racist policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1678036/8934231/1226549467?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkNTg3ZC1lMDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUeqXIy85YfkHY4on7Lriv4AFMG__AvpLdXeKl-s4s0=), I was helping "criminals."** We are not surprised by this attack, but we need to respond in the best way possible: by talking directly to the voters about how Congress can support their lives. Will you help me? [**Please donate $20 or more today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1678037/8934232/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkNTg3ZC1lMDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUeqXIy85YfkHY4on7Lriv4AFMG__AvpLdXeKl-s4s0=). **If my team can speak directly to the people who are affected by McCaul's policies, it won't matter what misleading information he throws out there**. You know that I am committed to fighting for every voter in TX-10. **[With your help today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1678038/8934233/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGRkNTg3ZC1lMDhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DUeqXIy85YfkHY4on7Lriv4AFMG__AvpLdXeKl-s4s0=), I can make sure we have real representation next year.** Thank you for standing with me, Mike

clean_body: = Join our team! = or =. Peter, Today, a local supporter received a call from a "research firm" in Houston. The firm asked questions about the Texas 10th Congressional District, emphasizing my opponent's claimed accomplishments. The firm also suggested I had "put criminals back in the streets" in my previous work as a civil rights lawyer. This is the first attack against me, and unlikely to be the last. We can see McCaul is going to use the same hateful rhetoric that is too common today. McCaul wants voters to believe that when =, I was helping "criminals." We are not surprised by this attack, but we need to respond in the best way possible: by talking directly to the voters about how Congress can support their lives. Will you help me? =. If my team can speak directly to the people who are affected by McCaul's policies, it won't matter what misleading information he throws out there. You know that I am committed to fighting for every voter in TX-10. =, I can make sure we have real representation next year. Thank you for standing with me, Mike = = = = = Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701.

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: 1. Elect women 2. Replace Republicans 3. Protect health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c08/24c69fd9/27eb4b277/188216e9/3553782620/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES45N_digital_email_20180718_ObamacareStories_inact&source=WQEFES45N_digital_email_20180718_ObamacareStories_inact")
---

Peter,

When Republicans voted to repeal Obamacare last year, they voted to kick millions of Americans off their health insurance.

For many of our House candidates, that vote wasn't just a bad call -- it was _personal_ to them and their families.

Our women understand the consequences of jeopardizing health care, and they will fight like hell to make sure Republicans _never_ succeed at repealing Obamacare.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to the House and replace Republicans who voted to take away health insurance from women and families.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c08/24c69fd9/27eb4b277/188216ea/3553782620/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180718_email_ObamacareStories?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFES45N_digital_email_20180718_ObamacareStories_inact&source=WQEFES45N_digital_email_20180718_ObamacareStories_inact")**

We've endorsed nearly 30 pro-choice Democratic women who can take the seats of anti-Obamacare Republicans in the House, including these three candidates:
When **Betsy Dirksen Londrigan's (IL-13)** son suddenly became ill and was put in a medically induced coma, hospitalizing him for 24 days, health insurance kept her family from going bankrupt.

Diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes as a teenager, **Kim Schrier (WA-08)** spent so much time with doctors that she decided to become a pediatrician. Now, she's running for office because of Republican efforts to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

**Lauren Underwood (IL-14)** was diagnosed with a heart condition at 8 years old. She became a registered nurse and served under President Obama, helping to implement the Affordable Care Act and expand access to Medicaid.
These women are the perfect replacements for anti-Obamacare Republicans precisely _because of_ their experiences with the health care system.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to replace Republicans who threaten Obamacare:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Fight-Obamacare-Repeal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c08/24c69fd9/27eb4b277/188216eb/3553782620/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180718_email_ObamacareStories?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFightObamacareRe&utm_campaign=WQEFES45N_digital_email_20180718_ObamacareStories_inact&source=WQEFES45N_digital_email_20180718_ObamacareStories_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c08/24c69fd9/27eb4b277/188216e4/3553782620/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180718_email_ObamacareStories?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFES45N_digital_email_20180718_ObamacareStories_inact&source=WQEFES45N_digital_email_20180718_ObamacareStories_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|

name: Regina Bateson
subject: Did you hear?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Friends,
Did you hear the news?
In just a few weeks, the former #TeamBateson HQ will be re-opening as the campaign office for Assembly candidate Jackie Smith.
Jackie needs our help to pay the rent, and she needs volunteers to fill the building with positive energy once again.
Https://secure.actblue.com/do nate/teambateson4Jackie [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambateson4Jackie]
Can you step up and get involved? More details are below.
Thank you,
Regina
Sent: 7/18/2018, 2:53 pm
From: Regina Bateson <regina@bateson4congress.com>
Subject: The right voice at the right time
Dear #TeamBateson,
Many of you stepped up and got involved in my campaign because you want to see more smart, capable women in government -- and we can still make that happen.
This week, I'm going to introduce you to two fantastic candidates here in Northern California.
First up is Jackie Smith. Jackie is a businesswoman and community leader running for the CA State Assembly in District 6, which includes parts of Placer County, El Dorado County, and Sacramento County.
Https://secure.actblue.com/don ate/teambateson4Jackie [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambateson4Jackie]
Jackie is qualified, compassionate, and business-savvy. She's a strong advocate for seniors, affordable housing, and immigrants' rights. She's the right voice at the right time.
Jackie is running to unseat a freshman GOP Assemblyman. Jackie's race is very competitive, especially because parts of her district have elected a Democrat to represent them in Congress (Rep. Ami Bera).
The votes are there for Jackie to win -- but she needs our help to make it happen.
Please step up and support Jackie today: Https://secure.actblue. com/donate/teambateson4Jackie [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambateson4Jackie]
I also encourage you to volunteer for Jackie's campaign: http://www.smith4assembly.com/volunteer [http://www.smith4assembly.com/volunteer]
In a few weeks, Jackie's campaign will be moving into our old #TeamBateson HQ in Rocklin. Please sign up to help Jackie, and let's fill our old offices with positive energy once again.
Thank you so much for all that you do, and please -- stay engaged.
-Regina
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62063/images/Regina%20Bateson%20for%20Congress%20logo.png]Regina is running for Congress in California’s highly competitive 4th Congressional District.
Help spread the word! Forward this email to 5 friends to help Regina’s grassroots campaign grow.
Regina can’t win this race without support from people like you. Join her people-powered movement by contributing here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-footer?&amount=25.00&recurring=true]
You can also get involved by following Regina on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/bateson2018/] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/bateson2018?lang=en] If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, click below.
Checks may be made payable to: Bateson for Congress, PO BOX 1130 Roseville, CA, 95678

name: The Sanders Institute
subject: Bill McKibben has a message Americans need to hear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Sanders Institute Fellow Bill McKibben outlines some of the key facts about the solar and coal industries. He shows why the renewable energy industry is the clear path forward both for our planet and
#
Friend,
In the 2015-2016 election cycle, the fossil fuel industry in America received over **$20 billion** in federal subsidies. These subsidies are not only encouraging economic behavior that is decimating our environment but they are putting the welfare of a dying industry above the future of life as we know it.
Yet, pundits and politicians defend these actions by spreading the myth that the fossil fuel industry, especially coal, should be saved for the future of American jobs and the benefit of the American economy.
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa69/bed43eb/62d1a248/75fd4eb7/3697877609/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-renewable-energy-jobs-myth")
**[In this video, Sanders Institute Fellow Bill McKibben outlines some of the key facts about the solar and coal industries](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa69/bed43eb/62d1a248/75fd4eb7/3697877609/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-renewable-energy-jobs-myth").** He shows why the renewable energy industry is the clear path forward both for our planet and for American jobs.
Thanks for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute
**[DONATE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa69/bed43eb/62d1a248/75fd4eb6/3697877609/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180718-full")**
PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
131 CHURCH STREET
BURLINGTON, VT 05401

He shows why the renewable energy industry is the clear path forward both for our planet and Friend, In the 2015-2016 election cycle, the fossil fuel industry in America received over $20 billion in federal subsidies. These subsidies are not only encouraging economic behavior that is decimating our environment but they are putting the welfare of a dying industry above the future of life as we know it. Yet, pundits and politicians defend these actions by spreading the myth that the fossil fuel industry, especially coal, should be saved for the future of American jobs and the benefit of the American economy. name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Did you know?
body:
We exempted many from income tax on Social Security |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=da098aea65&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2748ebd047&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5077df2332&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=89e4cf0e9e&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1a06a35b22&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1a06a35b22&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Friend,
---
| **I wanted to draw your attention to a major victory we achieved in our affordability agenda this legislative session.** Until this year, only five states - Vermont included - fully taxed Social Security income for seniors. **In my Budget Address, I proposed to the Legislature that we bring that number down to four, and I’m happy to report we did just that!**

**Starting next year, Vermont’s seniors who are living on low- to moderate- incomes will no longer pay tax on the Social Security benefits they receive.** Until this year, Vermont was double-taxing seniors living on fixed income. That was simply unacceptable to me, and I’m happy to say we were able to remove this tax.

Although we’ve made progress, Vermont still remains unaffordable for too many. We all know individuals who grew up in Vermont, started a family here, and would love to retire here, but had to leave because they simply couldn’t afford to stay. **That is why it’s my top priority to ensure Vermont is an affordable option for everyone who wants to live here!**

Sincerely,

Phil Scott

** P.S. - If you agree that we need to continue our work to make Vermont more affordable, _please vote for me on, or before, August 14th in the Republican Primary_. I would appreciate your support!**

---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4a94c44d75e94ffab085270e62877be4&_e=dagA9zjjPfg4nmTSC34u6DL60J-d6vh4zavXMWtiJO-gYumoeWEdL787HuLFeGRVJ1Afu61bQLFTlZ6w-5BwnNn_dzYVfcxssF6K8zvLho4fj9gAhLVi3ZXX3164srUWzq8H9zB8dOZQqjif057-5peAOk6lXhKqsDWJIvpKIAsp7q7UGDh7ySiUNWGpy0m2iwD4GWQ21m-hecjooslOh4bQNxfoeag1UKgyV6f-YRkQrObXD-8QS4jKzPpQs08E). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4a94c44d75e94ffab085270e62877be4&_e=7Vnm-xhBT-ViDIEukLjPzAGR7iUIIgUEjsZw-X3FXKHJg8aoALPGO-O6oQwbMy9vRZAY-ZVnwJo63jCAtmGqd6OelvsKdC5CevWpS2vvwBz72NRoiR2JPWZZ8aXxQrs2zUW8dezdDQIt2Q9lWaS9dQNuYFxmsDEpAPMi1dya0c8HZsD1SxKU_3hshxm_Ge12dSqB1NzQPXME-x1gDJ08am-wICwnSRDe4aJb9R-GyMHAg1KHxP6U8Mn4xsz9elw_cl2DLCvWnwyiUXhBs7LHMDi3sBfR6GwZjv7cnGvtH5wEhHrJ0E5LTVY9mEYpup3Dd9ZIjfW8tgbFRBZfT4MSwtkO0nO8-8j_3DzwqKBZ8GF02xj1y0z3Jyok8tURhaKL) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4a94c44d75e94ffab085270e62877be4&_e=7Vnm-xhBT-ViDIEukLjPzAGR7iUIIgUEjsZw-X3FXKE1lhGAykjuL9yQ1edOkT4UL1qJgZO6ekNrZGEtf_5bA0wsEz8icr4nLrEZA10zFE2gGVJBLdzT9RL55c8BCrvJI7rsDRxkEXF6FAyNoVGS6N5AIz63plVmNj-0L3kViebw_Deo38kabWW8f4-m6CMtberPU9M-jhR0fH_73eOFFdHK0ldf8osOEsTi2L8KhMtizqEmV6ae9JDRZj1GT8Wofzyw9Yp48KAsL7fqoJbZwxRdk9bsnxMK_SMHGhcTLyanmhoe_t3XN2ZrUAlZKGFI0AKjsk6sqzU2siz80Ra9eYNsOYjeLrqd0MLk6qKqFSY-qA0bOBrXg5_0SRFYM6jI) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4a94c44d75e94ffab085270e62877be4&_e=7Vnm-xhBT-ViDIEukLjPzEuqEmWZQHSrn6lwOiVAZh-t2M1KG1ZsLcEA4zdNTrCd-wfDQfA7T5h0q9HgrIuEYYTolG84hP0VKX79kcYOGHNLy7VOWGY989Dd9P1iWo-rHuvz74iwWqxGwbkebHmcxgkx0IaArA_d1QJTu6A7cXvFfAvHLyTtlaVvP10cZAyrMZveem-x5E7x5XEar2CejUFHotw6DSaNACDh908pH8FEzbcuW3flS-DUiyy5q702VabuM2N3KUVFdaYgchwbSw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4a94c44d75e94ffab085270e62877be4&_e=7Vnm-xhBT-ViDIEukLjPzNMxPk_8k6_TNcvbwZg_khQe9Q1pRg_5gN7E5ug2a7jH0DW_geDtURzilrhzWqeUU3Rbb5frl6o2PVSX0vQoaoA2ZkpjCcX-dY1ZDRahZW46xHfyLjfNJXp1ur8BFu0vOPAbbfwGxayLvkKO7G9wkkKH0FAtmMWayfMLGQs065-CdLeclX1Ur8JVc7EyAUn_AntJJF3YUAEIer3ybkrhiN82BnGs8H8DGny5lNN-INohTwQAD1QSs44viWxyt-ej9w%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4a94c44d75e94ffab085270e62877be4&_e=7Vnm-xhBT-ViDIEukLjPzNS9rsRAcfDoDzBmoV1bp5Dg-cpSxLcklGXMfFR2WcrztuHwVbE23tJPN-d-Zdcp7B-TDIFlzK3QrDN6dN8IgMxInC7owxjphq7_K4yYvLybUmkesjVnbos_9TYI7RygODrdtIqSI1m4R808afXu87W7k_xGr0h7LFxLObS-8hoJ2eTC586KvtAg-klZN1-t7-sXtjsTbHA30EXkR-O23yMo0ELmGtBjHGsna_WWwkbDW41Jb5iNktdqJGbDpq1tJQ%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=4a94c44d75e94ffab085270e62877be4&_e=7Vnm-xhBT-ViDIEukLjPzAGR7iUIIgUEjsZw-X3FXKHSjyzzFKpt5Za7PUJNTZXD50bnz5AmDNPVdAdZmE8QpHz0PvmCSLI2pyhNwfnLhwrIdmvuQEyNK2Ozm1eYs23QsfHCRuEx4gh3l60xrh4nPXFSeSLp8nQ3GZN-udi7-W0sFZ3o6VPuf187NNrZaTKY8iYAXNB61Vv4hnWgs1w6R_3VZ5nnER8ZQZgc-LR6rAAAtEmdn9Bw57jhKtbAdUoRi4Jhd9fjVf2CkDpTtCnOoWYpv0CZLx7P9WWqRmOHCELdlPej7xT5ImiAPI9JzDgpiSB3BAKmW_wIf53ORyDrAIR_2w0bhFtldGlpgEalnYfoAFZybE6Eiv974MsS7jCRWnj3ceef4ujdJ3L5k8yBsw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. clean_body: Did you see the news? A new poll by the Marquette University Law School has our campaign WINNING the primary by two percent — a seven-point swing from Friend, Did you see the news? A new poll by the Marquette University Law School has our campaign WINNING the primary. This is great news, but it means nothing if we don’t keep the momentum going. Wisconsin knows I'm the proven conservative we need to send Tammy Baldwin packing. I’m fired up and ready to REJECT her big-government, far-left philosophy. Let’s show the world that left-wing extremism has no place in Wisconsin. Furthermore, DC special interests who opposed President Trump and Governor Walker in their primaries are spending big to stop me. They know I won’t support politics as usual and have a record of making real change happen, so they’re doing everything they can to make sure I don’t win this primary. Help me tell the swamp that we don’t want them meddling in our elections. Together, we can build on this great momentum and push forward toward the finish line in November! Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Tim Kaine
subject: President Trump and Vladimir Putin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I wanted to write you a note about President Trump's actions during his meeting and press conference with Vladimir Putin:

**What we saw this week from President Trump isn't just disgraceful; it makes Americans less safe.**

By siding with a hostile foreign power over American law enforcement, Trump is jeopardizing our future national security and emboldening our enemies.

The president's comments were so alarming because he's dismissing all of the facts and very real concerns - while future elections remain at risk.

**We must protect Americans from attacks by foreign adversaries, and we must safeguard our elections from foreign interference.**

Elections will always have consequences. We cannot be bystanders and we cannot expect this ship to right itself. We have to show up, we have to care, and we have to vote in November so we can finally be in a position to hold those who have sought to interfere in our democracy accountable. **Holding our Senate seats, and taking a majority, is the check on this administration _we desperately need._**

[We have a chance to make a statement at the ballot box on November 6, 2018.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f121a/3e0906/6936e2b4/3e35e6f8/3523102323/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-russia?refcode=20180718_2_FR_TK_Russia-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+We+have+a+chance+to+make+a+statement+at+&utm_campaign=20180718_2_FR_TK_Russia-RS&source=20180718_2_FR_TK_Russia-RS")

The stakes have never been higher, Derek.

_Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f121a/3e0906/6936e2b4/3e35e6ff/3523102323/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-russia?refcode=20180718_2_FR_TK_Russia-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180718_2_FR_TK_Russia-RS&source=20180718_2_FR_TK_Russia-RS")

body:

| | | Quick update for you: We're only $2,218 away from hitting our mid-month budget goal!

**_[You can help us keep our team organizing on the ground by giving before midnight.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+You+can+help+us+keep+our+team+organizing&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180718_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180718_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180718_2_4")_** Republicans are investing _big_ in organizing this year (see below) so we can't miss a single deadline.

\-- Brad

**Begin original message:**

_" The Republican National Committee says its efforts to contact voters ahead of the November midterms are on pace to match, and in some categories have already surpassed, the 2016 presidential election." \- NBC News_

The RNC has contacted 20 million voters. What are you doing to combat this? Well, you can start by helping secure Martin's Democratic seat in New Mexico. **_[Donate $29 now!](http://nm.martinheinrich. We won't sugarcoat this news, team: This is bad.

National Republicans have already contacted over 20 million voters by phone and at their doors. They are ahead of the Democratic National Committee in fundraising. And now, they are on pace to surpass their 2016 organizing efforts.

**The GOP knows the blue wave is coming for them this November, and that 's why they are throwing hundreds of millions of dollars into a top-down strategy to keep control of Congress.**
**[FIGHT BACK!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+FIGHT+BACK&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180718_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180718_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180718_2_4")** Martin must hold onto his seat this November if we're going to have ANY chance at retaking the Senate. But the Koch brothers are already running digital ads against him, and this latest news from the RNC is the last thing we needed.

As Democrats, we pride ourselves on our grassroots organizing. But Republicans and the Koch brothers are getting in the game and they're willing to spend BIG to keep their majorities.

Give $29 or more before midnight to help close our budget gap>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: Greg Stanton
subject: what is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
President Trump has selected Judge Kavanaugh to replace Justice Anthony Kennedy on the nation's highest court.

**Based on Kavanaugh 's record his appointment will jeopardize many proven, popular policies that make our communities stronger including a woman's right to choose, environmental protections, workers' rights and protections and even the right to marry who you love. **

It is up you and I to speak out and make sure the Senate doesn't confirm someone who opposes our shared values.

**[Will you join me in demanding the Senate _reject _Kavanaugh?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-dIisRqhX1xAvKv4olFkfOBIP1Gik3B8FL6GMR0Iilw=/QMJQfpTaVCi2Je_0Ct2AgUuTbVVt-IHaSVyHvGjQz7Q=?source=Stanton&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/supreme-court-Stanton-AB)**

With you in the fight,

\-- _Greg_

[__](https://act.myngp.com/el/-dIisRqhX1xAvKv4olFkfOBIP1Gik3B8FL6GMR0Iilw=/QMJQfpTaVCi2Je_0Ct2AgUuTbVVt-IHaSVyHvGjQz7Q=?source=Stanton&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/supreme-court-Stanton-AB)

| | **The Koch-backed group, Americans for Prosperity, just announced a digital ad blitz ... and they are targeting Ohio.** It probably isn't a coincidence this comes immediately after a recent poll shows that Sherrod is losing ground to his opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci. We're not the only ones who see these tightening polls. Special interests like the Koch brothers use polls as guidance for where they can spend millions to buy Senate seats. And unfortunately, Ohio is on their list. [**Your grassroots support can defeat special interest spending. **The GOP is ALL IN on this Nevada Senate race , team:**
* After President Trump came to Nevada last month to fundraise for GOP Sen. Dean Heller, Heller had his **best fundraising quarter EVER.**

* A Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC **IS POURING $11.2 MILLION** into ads against Democrat Jacky Rosen.

* A recent poll shows that this race to decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court is **NECK AND NECK****.**

**It's clear: If the election were held today, we could lose the race that Nate Silver says Democrats likely ****NEED to win if we want to take back the Senate from Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.**
But right now, we're not raising enough to keep pace with the GOP - so we're counting on you to help us close the gap.
